notes: Player Data upgrades — stylised Norse character portrait (uses the save file's skin/hair colours + beard/hair style), Biomes Discovered chips link to the filtered Valheim Data, stats row shows 'out of' totals (Trophies x/58, Forsaken x/7), new Undiscovered tab on the Knowledge table, and a Copy-to-clipboard icon on every knowledge row. Dashboard achievements show out-of numbers for Trophies (x/58) and Recipes (x/737). Back button on item/station/vendor detail pages now returns to the page you came from (browser-style) instead of always dropping to the Valheim Data list.
